query.text:
declare @unit varchar(128), @custID varchar(64) select @custID = '#10$' + @ma_kh + '#20$%', @unit = case when @ma_dvcs = '' then @@unit else @ma_dvcs end
exec MaxvOnline$App$Voucher$Finding 'PN6', 'c59$000000', 'm59$', 'i59$', 'ngay_ct', 'convert(char(6), {0}, 112)', 'dateadd(month, 1, {0})', '000000', @@refresh, @@pageIndex, @@pageCount, @@lastPage, @@lastCount, @@firstItem, @@lastItem, @custID, '', 'stt_rec', 'so_ct,stt_rec,ngay_ct,t_so_luong,dien_giai,status', 'so_ct,stt_rec,ngay_ct,t_so_luong,dien_giai,b.status,b.statusname%l', 'a left join dmttct b on a.status = b.status where b.ma_ct = ''PN6''', 'ngay_ct, so_ct', 1, @@userID, 1, @ngay_ct1, @ngay_ct2, '', '', '1', '0', @unit
